chunks.text: Our staff go above and beyond to support the students, enable the faculty, and keep the department running smoothly. Staff Contact Quick List: Support group email addresses. Organizational Chart: Who reports to whom: from Chairs to staff. Includes a link to the IRIS org chart.
chunks.question: What is the primary role of EECS staff?
chunks.answer: Support students, enable faculty, run department.

chunks.text: Our Leadership: Industrial and Public Relations Staff: Corporate Access Program (CAP), student recruitment and information sessions; Berkeley EECS Affiliates (BEECSA) program, BEARS conference, Joint Colloquium, and special events; technical reports, research summaries, grad student resume directory and other publications.
chunks.question: What programs do Industrial Relations staff manage?
chunks.answer: CAP, BEECSA, BEARS conference, Joint Colloquium.

chunks.text: Student Affairs Staff: Admissions; undergraduate and graduate programs; individual administrative assistance for all EE and CS students; reader/tutor assignments; Self-Paced Center.
chunks.question: What services do Student Affairs staff provide?
chunks.answer: Admissions, programs, student assistance, tutor assignments.

chunks.text: Course Support Staff: EE and CS course materials/copying services, textbook adoption and instructional library; eGrade submission; class scheduling in Cory and Soda Halls.
chunks.question: What do Course Support staff handle?

chunks.text: Faculty Support Staff: Chair support; academic personnel (merits, promotions, leave, recruiting, faculty policies, benefits, etc.); faculty awards.
chunks.question: What does Faculty Support staff manage?
chunks.answer: Chair support, academic personnel, faculty awards.

chunks.text: Human Resources Staff: Payroll and benefits. Computer and IT Support Staff: Instructional and administrative computing, EECS Help Desk, computer accounts and user support; information management, administrative database support, web and event calendar support.
chunks.question: What are the main HR and IT staff functions?
chunks.answer: Payroll, benefits, computing support, Help Desk.

chunks.text: Facilities and Engineering Services Staff: Cory and Soda Hall keys, card keys, copy cards, mail delivery, room reservations, and building management (maintenance, space planning, safety); phone lines; engineering and infrastructure development and support for Cory and Soda Hall instructional labs; online lecture capturing and AV support; parking arrangements.
chunks.question: What do Facilities staff manage?
chunks.answer: Building access, maintenance, labs, AV, parking.

chunks.text: Accounting & Financial Services Staff: Purchasing, reimbursements, fund balances, card management, recharge/billing.
chunks.question: What financial tasks do Accounting staff handle?
